Follow these steps to export your schema and data from your source database, then import it into Prisma Postgres.

Export from your source database
Run this command to create a backup file (replace __DATABASE_URL__ with your connection string):

pg_dump \
     -Fc \
     -v \
     -d __DATABASE_URL__ \
     -n public \
     -f db_dump.bak
(This produces db_dump.bak containing your tables and rows.)

Import data into Prisma Postgres
Use the direct connection string below to restore your database from the backup file (created in the previous step).

prisma+postgres://accelerate.prisma-data.net/?api_key=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJqd3RfaWQiOjEsInNlY3VyZV9rZXkiOiJza19fWmNqT2dqa1Foc0hld1MxaUJTQTkiâ€¦
Run this command to restore from the backup file (replace __DATABASE_URL__ with your connection string):

pg_restore \
  -d "__DATABASE_URL__" \
  -v \
  ./db_dump.bak \
  && echo "-complete-"
Verify with Prisma Studio
Once the import finishes, launch Prisma Studio to browse your data visually:
